title: Hosted Checkout Credential
description: A reference-only credential for hosted checkout flows. Unlike card credentials which contain payment data, this credential contains only a session correlation identifier. The actual payment processing occurs entirely within the provider's hosted UI — no sensitive payment data passes through UCP.

type.description: Discriminator value identifying this as a hosted checkout credential.

session_id.description: Provider's internal session or order identifier. Used for debugging, webhook correlation, and support ticket resolution. Examples: a Razorpay order_id, a PayPal order_id, or a provider-assigned session token. Not required for payment processing — the provider correlates payment to the UCP session independently via webhook.
